summary: Iteration 277: Category Structure, Weekly Digest Fix, Phone Standardization - All features verified working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, cleaned up TEST_ prefixed entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 277 verified: 1) GET /api/categories returns canonical categories with subcategories (no TEST_ entries), categories include: Office Supplies, Apparel, Printed Materials, Printers, Stationery, etc. 2) GET /api/admin/weekly-digest/snapshot revenue_breakdown has NO 'Uncategorized' - shows real category names: General (45.9%), Office Supplies (45.2%), Apparel (8.9%). 3) Weekly Digest page at /admin/weekly-digest renders Revenue Breakdown with real category names. 4) Affiliate Application page at /partners/apply uses PhoneNumberField with country prefix selector (🇹🇿 TZ +255 default, 10 East African countries available). 5) Affiliates page at /admin/partnerships/affiliates create drawer uses PhoneNumberField with country prefix. 6) Phone numbers saved in normalized format (+255XXXXXXXXX) when creating affiliates or submitting applications. 7) POST /api/affiliate-applications accepts normalized phone format. 8) POST /api/admin/affiliates accepts normalized phone format.

details: GET /api/categories returns 200 (public, no auth required)
Response has ok=true and categories array
Each category has id, name, slug, subcategories fields
No TEST_ prefixed categories or subcategories
Categories have real business names (Office Supplies, Apparel, etc.)
GET /api/admin/weekly-digest/snapshot returns 200 with auth
revenue_breakdown array exists with category, revenue, pct fields
NO 'Uncategorized' in revenue_breakdown
Categories are real names: General (45.9%), Office Supplies (45.2%), Apparel (8.9%)
No UUID categories - all resolved to human-readable names
PhoneNumberField component present at /partners/apply
Country prefix selector with flag (🇹🇿 TZ +255)
Dropdown shows 10 East African countries (TZ, KE, UG, RW, NG, ZA, CD, ET, GH, MW)
Phone number input accepts digits only
Helper text: 'Enter number without the leading 0'
PhoneNumberField component present in create affiliate drawer
Country prefix selector with flag (🇹🇿 TZ +255)
Phone number input in drawer form
Phone normalized to +XXXXXXXXXXXXX format on save
POST /api/affiliate-applications accepts normalized phone (+255712345678)
POST /api/admin/affiliates accepts normalized phone (+254712345678)
Phone stored in normalized format in database
